variants: Shanaya Banoo has obtained the Kiln Animator Credential, showcasing her qualification and practice in kiln animation. She has published her research findings in the Hazelstar Manuscript Guild, marking her presence in the academic community. Under the mentorship of Therese Normann, she has developed her skills and insight further in this artistic domain. Beyond her professional work, Shanaya dedicates her time as a Park Volunteer at Sagebriar, contributing to local conservation efforts. The Starlit Venture Trust serves as her primary funding source, fostering her innovative projects in the field.
